name: takawasi-novelforge-app
description: Desktop app specialized for NovelForge — write novels via agent chat

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/copy-renderer-assets.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:cli && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run build:cli && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run build:cli && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run build:cli && electron-builder --linux

author: takawasi
